job_title: Senior Business Intelligence Analyst | The Points Guy
strengths: Quantified impact in roles and projects
weaknesses: Limited explicit Looker or semantic layer experience
No mention of Statsmodels or advanced stats libraries
improvement_bullets: Architected and maintained the semantic layer for client performance data, ensuring standardized metrics across dashboards and simplifying complex data models for non-technical stakeholders.
Utilized Python, including Pandas and Statsmodels, to conduct advanced statistical analysis and hypothesis testing on 2M+ row datasets to forecast consumer behavior and mitigate lending risk.

Collaborated with data engineering teams to design and optimize data pipelines within cloud warehouse environments like Snowflake and BigQuery, ensuring high-fidelity data availability for BI reporting.
Applied advanced SQL and window functions to reconcile disparate data sources, serving as a primary contributor to data warehouse integrity and reliable cross-functional reporting.
Leveraged BI tools to perform ad-hoc, multi-step analyses that translated raw transactional data into actionable business intelligence, driving revenue-impacting strategies.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Senior Business Intelligence Analyst | The Points Guy opportunity with Red Ventures. I am interested in this opportunity because of your commitment to building high-growth digital experiences and the unique way The Points Guy simplifies complex financial decisions for millions of consumers. What interests me about working for Red Ventures is its data-driven approach to digital growth; the opportunity to contribute to a world-class analytics ecosystem that supports such a high-impact portfolio truly inspires me. I believe my technical proficiency in SQL and Python and my experience in architecting data visualization ecosystems would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached complex data problems by focusing on both technical rigor and business impact. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I identified that manual reporting was causing a bottleneck in executive decision-making. I spearheaded the transition to an automated Power BI dashboarding suite, which integrated disparate data sources into a unified reporting layer. This initiative reduced data processing time by 40% and directly empowered stakeholders to reallocate resources toward high-growth marketing channels, resulting in a 300% increase in new customer acquisition. Ultimately, I know that the Senior Business Intelligence Analyst | The Points Guy role at Red Ventures would allow me to bring my passion for data storytelling to the migration and architecture of your new visualization platform. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my data pipeline and semantic modeling skills. I collaborated directly with Underwriting and Product teams to integrate complex PostgreSQL datasets, building clean and reliable schemas that allowed engineers to trust our reporting data. This project reduced project delivery delays by 25% by ensuring that data structures were optimized for both performance and accessibility. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in Python and advanced statistical analysis in working on full-funnel performance reporting at Red Ventures. I know that my analytical mindset and deep comfort with large, complex datasets align with what it takes to succeed at the Senior Business Intelligence Analyst | The Points Guy role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
